query:
-- Update Iowa @ Illinois (game 2370007) → South E8, bracketGameId 502
UPDATE games SET
  bracketGameId = '502',
  bracketRound = 'E8',
  bracketRegion = 'SOUTH',
  bracketSlot = '1',
  nextBracketGameId = '601',
  nextBracketSlot = 'top'
WHERE id = 2370007;

-- Update Purdue @ Arizona (game 2370008) → West E8, bracketGameId 503
UPDATE games SET
  bracketGameId = '503',
  bracketRound = 'E8',
  bracketRegion = 'WEST',
  bracketSlot = '1',
  nextBracketGameId = '601',
  nextBracketSlot = 'bottom'
WHERE id = 2370008;

-- Update the placeholder E8 row 502 (SOUTH) with actual teams
UPDATE games SET
  awayTeam = 'iowa',
  homeTeam = 'illinois'
WHERE bracketGameId = '502' AND bracketRound = 'E8' AND id != 2370007;

-- Update the placeholder E8 row 503 (WEST) with actual teams
UPDATE games SET
  awayTeam = 'purdue',
  homeTeam = 'arizona'
WHERE bracketGameId = '503' AND bracketRound = 'E8' AND id != 2370008;
